mapper.select: SELECT 0 AS ALERT_SEQ, 0 AS CASE_ID_SEQ, SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{alertId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIC66B ( SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, OK_CCD, AI_RESULT, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{alertDt}, #{alertNo}, 'STR', #{alertStCd}, #{custNo}, #{riskScr}, '0', #{remark}, #{regId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = #{alertStCd}, OK_CCD = #{closeRsnCd}, AI_RESULT = #{remark}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_ID = #{alertNo}
mapper.select: SELECT RPR_PRGRS_CCD AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM NIC66B GROUP BY RPR_PRGRS_CCD
